data.title: Investor Increases Ethereum Holdings Despite Losses
data.description:
According to BlockBeats On-chain Detection, investor Huang Licheng, known as 'Brother Ma Ji,' has recently increased his Ethereum holdings by purchasing an additional 200 ETH. Over the past eight hours, he has accumulated a total of 350 ETH. Currently, his leveraged position of 25 times on Ethereum is experiencing a floating loss of $1.925 million, equating to a 195% loss. His total position now stands at 7,750 ETH, valued at $24.6 million, with an entry price of $3,422 and a liquidation price of $3,047.

Additionally, Huang has placed limit orders to close 475 ETH positions at prices ranging from $3,188 to $3,400.

data.title: Berkshire Hathaway Adjusts Portfolio with Alphabet Investment Amid Apple Stock Reduction
data.description:
According to PANews, Berkshire Hathaway, led by U.S. President Donald Trump, has disclosed a $4.3 billion stake in Alphabet, Google's parent company, while simultaneously reducing its holdings in Apple. This move positions Alphabet as the tenth largest holding in Berkshire's portfolio. The decision marks a departure from Warren Buffett's traditional strategy of investing in value stocks rather than high-growth companies, as he approaches retirement at the end of the year.

In the third quarter, Berkshire Hathaway sold approximately $11 billion worth of Apple shares. Aside from its investments in Apple and Alphabet, Berkshire's largest stock positions do not include major technology companies. Its other significant holdings, which remained largely unchanged during the third quarter, include American Express, Bank of America, and Coca-Cola.

data.title: Founders Fund Reduces Stake in Bitmine
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, recent filings with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission reveal that Founders Fund, led by billionaire and prominent Silicon Valley investor Peter Thiel, has sold half of its shares in Bitmine. The venture capital firm now holds 2,547,001 shares in the company.

Previously, it was reported that Founders Fund Growth II Management disclosed a 9.1% stake in BitMine Immersion Technologies as of July 8.

data.title: Hong Kong businessman indicted for filing false SEC investment adviser forms for shell companies
data.description:
A Hong Kong businessman has been indicted for allegedly filing false and deceptive investment adviser forms with the US SEC.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/hong-kong-man-filing-false-sec/

data.title: Hong Kong SFC Flags HKTWeb3 as Suspicious Virtual Asset Platform
data.description: According to PANews, the Hong Kong Securities and Futures Commission (SFC) has added a virtual asset trading platform named 'HKTWeb3' to its list of suspicious virtual asset trading platforms. The SFC's website indicates that HKTWeb3 is not licensed by the commission. Although the platform's website claims a partnership with a licensed virtual asset trading platform, the licensed entity has confirmed that it has no association with HKTWeb3.

data.title: Aster clarified that its token economic model remains unchanged, and future unlocked tokens will be transferred to a separate address.
data.description: Aster, a perpetual contract provider, issued a statement on the X platform clarifying that the recent update to the ASTER token economic model has caused confusion within the community. Aster stated that the ASTER token economic model remains unchanged. The update aimed to accurately reflect the circulating supply of tokens and address issues regarding the monthly unlocking allocation for the community and ecosystem. The monthly unlocked token allocation has remained unused and has not been included in the circulating supply of ASTER tokens. Unlocked tokens will be transferred to a separate public unlocking address, but there are currently no plans or needs to spend funds from this address.

data.title: American Bitcoin, a Bitcoin mining company affiliated with the Trump family, released its Q3 financial report: it added approximately 3,000 BTC during the quarter.
data.description: American Bitcoin, a Bitcoin mining company associated with the Trump family, released its Q3 2025 financial report, disclosing that it increased its holdings by approximately 3,000 BTC during the quarter. As of September 30, 2025, its Bitcoin holdings were approximately 3,418 BTC, and as of November 13, its Bitcoin holdings had increased to 4,090 BTC. The company mined 563 BTC in Q3, and the number of BTC pledged or otherwise secured during the same period was 2,385. Furthermore, the company's Q3 revenue was $64.2 million, net profit was $3.5 million, and total hashrate reached approximately 25.0 EH/s, representing a quarter-over-quarter increase of approximately 2.5 times in mining capacity. (PRNewswire)

data.title: Michael Saylor: Strategy has been buying Bitcoin every day this week.
data.description: Michael Saylor, founder and executive chairman of Bitcoin treasury company Strategy, posted on the X platform: "We bought bitcoin every day this week."

data.title: Applied Digital will raise $2.35 billion through a senior secured note offering.
data.description: Nasdaq-listed Bitcoin mining hosting and cloud services company Applied Digital announced it will raise $2.35 billion through a private placement of senior secured notes by its subsidiary APLD ComputeCo LLC. The offering is expected to close around November 20, 2025, depending on market and other conditions. The new funds will be used for the construction of its data center campus. (Globenewswire)

data.title: Analysis: Shifting market sentiment may pose risks to retail investors who purchase shares in digital asset treasury companies.
data.description: A report released by Singapore-based cryptocurrency research firm 10X Research indicates that retail investors who purchased shares in Digital Asset Treasury (DAT) have lost up to $17 billion. Analysts point out that a shift in market sentiment could put retail investors buying company stock at risk, especially those US-listed companies that use small-cap tokens as treasury reserves. Bloomberg cited the following examples: 1. Tharimmune raised $545 million to establish the Canton Coins treasury, pricing the Canton token at $0.20 at the time of its fundraising, but the current market price is $0.11; 2. Alt5 Sigma raised $1.5 billion to establish the WLFI treasury, pricing the WLFI token at $0.20 at the time of its fundraising, but the current market price is $0.14; 3. Flora Growth raised $401 million to establish the 0G treasury, pricing the 0G token at $3 at the time of its fundraising, but the current market price is $1.20. (Bloomberg)

data.description:

data.title: Bitdeer mined 125.5 BTC this week, bringing its total Bitcoin holdings to over 2470.3 BTC.
data.description: Nasdaq-listed Bitcoin mining company Bitdeer released its latest Bitcoin holdings data on the X platform. As of November 14, its Bitcoin holdings had increased to 2,470.3 BTC. In addition, its Bitcoin mining output this week was 125.5 BTC, but it sold 70.3 BTC during the same period.

data.title: ETHZilla releases Q3 financial report: Ethereum holdings increase to 102,273 ETH
data.description: ETHZilla Corporation, a Nasdaq-listed Ethereum treasury company, released its Q3 2025 financial report, disclosing that its Ethereum holdings have increased to 102,273 ETH, worth approximately $424 million. It has already spent $46.3 million to repurchase 2,099,472 shares. Furthermore, ETHZilla disclosed that it expects to launch its RWA product in the coming weeks, but did not provide specific details. (PRNewswire)

data.title: Ex-CFO sentenced after $35m crypto bet evaporates with Terra's collapse
data.description:
Former CFO Nevin Shetty was convicted of fraud after surreptitiously transferring $35 million of the company's money to his DeFi platform, losing almost all of it in Terra's collapse in 2022. Here is how the scheme happened and what happens now.
source: https://en.spaziocrypto.com/defi/ex-cfo-sentenced-after-35m-crypto-bet-evaporates-with-terras-collapse/

data.title: The Hong Kong Securities and Futures Commission (SFC) announced that its Chief Executive Officer, Leung Fung-yee, has been reappointed for a two-year term.
data.description: The Hong Kong Securities and Futures Commission (SFC) officially announced the reappointment of its Chief Executive Officer, Regina Leung, for a two-year term, effective January 1, 2026. Leung has served as SFC Chief Executive since January 1, 2023. During her tenure, she introduced a licensing system for virtual asset trading platforms and released a roadmap for virtual assets. She has been relatively supportive of the digital asset industry, stating that the future of digital assets is dynamic and promising. She also mentioned that the SFC will adopt a regulatory approach of applying the same business, risks, and rules to bring cryptocurrency OTC trading and custody institutions under its supervision.

data.title: Investor Increases Ethereum Holdings Amid Market Fluctuations
data.description: According to Odaily, investor Huang Licheng, known as 'Maji Da Ge,' has recently increased his leveraged Ethereum position. Utilizing a 25x leverage, Huang has added to his holdings, bringing his total to 7,745 ETH with a liquidation price of $3,047.88. Currently, he faces an unrealized loss of $1.968 million. Additionally, Huang has placed eight limit sell orders for ETH within the price range of $3,188.8 to $3,400.
